title: GANA Payment - Rekt
relevance_summary: Private key leak exploited via EIP-7702 delegator contract for repeated stake-unstake loops

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls EIP-7702 delegator contract with compromised owner key

summary: GANA Payment's protocol was exploited due to a private key leak, allowing the attacker to use an EIP-7702 delegator contract for repeated stake-unstake loops, draining $3.1 million from the protocol.
